TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Pasing ga niya mki sku Taycyo Si atu Wahe'i go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 376 buwan, 966 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 42% kyan ku 410 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 58% kyan ku 556 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 39%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pasing hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Pasing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Pasing hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pasing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Pasing hya' ga S'yux. tay 'llaw na Pasing hya' ga Lilang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pas~ɕiŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajʦ~ʨjo s~ɕi atu waħeʔi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pas~ɕiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na pas~ɕiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pas~ɕiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pas~ɕiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na pas~ɕiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕʔjux. taj ʔllaw na pas~ɕiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lilaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Pasing ga niya mki sku Taycyo Si atu Wahe'i go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 376 buwan, 966 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 42% kyan ku 410 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 58% kyan ku 556 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 39%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pasing hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Pasing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Pasing hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pasing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Pasing hya' ga S'yux. tay 'llaw na Pasing hya' ga Lilang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pas~ɕiŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajʦ~ʨjo s~ɕi atu waħeʔi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pas~ɕiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na pas~ɕiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pas~ɕiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pas~ɕiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na pas~ɕiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕʔjux. taj ʔllaw na pas~ɕiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lilaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
